subcodes.first_line: The Promise hath come, and the Promised One hath appeared from the horizon of might with manifest sovereignty. That which was inscribed hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد جاء الوعد و اتی الموعود من افق الاقتدار بسلطان مبین قد ظهر ما کان مسطورا
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prophecy and fulfillment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
